visual_style.rendering_style: Digital watercolor with soft pencil outlines
visual_style.lighting: Soft ambient glow with specific emissive highlights (Cyan/Blue)
visual_style.aesthetic: Chibi-inspired proportions with rounded, friendly silhouettes

character_attributes.anatomy: Anthro-vegetable (Bok Choy/Pechay) with stubby limbs and a layered leafy head
character_attributes.headwear: Traditional conical Asian farmer's hat (Salakot style) made of woven bamboo
tech_gear: Handheld tablet showing HydroGrow v2.1 dashboard

ui_design_prompt.system_instruction: Generate UI assets consistent with a soft-wash watercolor texture. Use #C5E8A4 as the primary action color. Buttons should have rounded corners (radius: 20px) to match the character's organic shape. Icons should utilize thin, dark-grey pencil-style strokes. Incorporate the blue emissive glow (#5CE1FF) for active states and 'Smart' notifications.
